reason: Personal-project V1 scope. The iso-compute Sobol-vs-BO baseline (430 h Phase-0 budget per H7) is deferred. V1 trusts the BO machinery without the formal head-to-head validation.
v1_substitute: BO-stall fallback: if Phase 4 Tier-0 best-J_fan does not improve over 20 consecutive acquisitions, switch to hand-picked diverse candidates rather than burn more compute. Diverse-candidate rule: pick from structurally-different Layer-2 archetypes (one louver-heavy, one TPMS-heavy, one near-baseline) rather than 5 small variations of one shape.
revisit_trigger: V2 scope, OR if V1 BO stalls and the operator wants to know whether BO is fundamentally outperforming Sobol on this objective.
